brief_summary: Two-column ledger. Left (coral filled, 'what the spring does control'): three real levers — initial force, bottom-out force, force curve shape — each in its own card with a short gloss. Right (bordeaux dashed with strikethrough): four common misattributions — smoothness, sound profile, scratch, spring ping — each crossed out with a bordeaux line, with the actual cause noted below.
data_sources: spring-swaps-explained.mdx § 'What the spring actually controls' — 'Three things. That is the whole list. Initial force ... Bottom-out force ... Force curve shape'
spring-swaps-explained.mdx § 'What the spring does not control' — 'Smoothness ... Sound profile signature ... Scratch ... Spring ping' with each attribution corrected
